hero.title: Digital employees with measurable impact.
hero.description: Selected work across voice agents, sales and process automation — with real results.

items.title: AI phone assistant with appointment booking
items.summary: A voice agent that answers every call, advises and books appointments straight into the calendar.
items.challenge: Calls outside business hours went unanswered and the team was tied up with constant callbacks — missed calls meant lost customers.
items.approach: We built an AI voice agent that answers calls, understands the request, checks calendar availability, books appointments and sends confirmations — connected to the existing CRM.
items.outcome: No call goes unanswered anymore, appointments are booked around the clock and the team has headspace for the actual work.

items.title: Automated lead research & outreach
items.summary: A sales agent that finds the right companies, scores leads and prepares outreach.
items.challenge: Manually researching and contacting potential customers cost the sales team hours every day — with modest results.
items.approach: We built an AI agent that researches target companies, finds contacts, scores leads by fit and drafts personalised emails and call scripts.
items.outcome: Sales starts every day with a full, prioritised pipeline and focuses on conversations instead of research.

items.title: Automated quoting & invoicing
items.summary: An automation that creates, sends and books quotes and invoices.
items.challenge: Quotes and invoices were created, sent and tracked manually — time-consuming and error-prone.
items.approach: We automated the entire process: merge data from forms and CRM, generate documents, send them, monitor payments and book everything cleanly.
items.outcome: Quotes and invoices now run almost by themselves — faster, error-free and fully traceable.

cta.title: Your project could be next.
cta.description: Let's talk about your use case.
